title: A Prophet
writer: Thomas Bidegain, Jacques Audiard, Abdel Raouf Dafri
actors: Tahar Rahim, Niels Arestrup, Adel Bencherif
plot: A delinquent Muslim man struggles to get by in prison until he is taken under the wing of a powerful mob boss, but his gradual rise through the organization's ranks brings him in conflict with his mentor.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 52 wins & 57 nominations total
